description_long: This object is a robust, semi-circular stone guard stone with a deep, bowl-like recess and a thick, uneven rim. The exterior surface is rough and weathered, featuring a prominent relief of a stylized animal or face motif on the front. The interior is concave and shows signs of accumulated grime and discoloration, suggesting long-term outdoor exposure. The rim is irregular, with visible chips and erosion, particularly along the edges. The stone's coloration is predominantly gray, with patches of darker staining and some lighter, worn areas. Its substantial mass and solid construction indicate it was designed to withstand significant impact or serve as a protective barrier.
description: A heavy, semi-circular stone guard stone with a rough, weathered surface and a carved face motif on the front. The object features a deep, concave recess and an irregular, chipped rim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved face motif and the thick, rounded rim.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the recess and the rough, textured exterior.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open, concave interior and the most eroded edge.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the uneven rim and additional surface wear.
attribute_location: Typically found at the entrance to driveways, along urban street corners, or adjacent to historical sites, often positioned to protect building facades or mark boundaries near pedestrian pathways.
attribute_installation_orientation: Meant to be partially embedded in the ground with the carved face and rim exposed above the surface.
attribute_wear_patterns: Visible chipping and erosion along the rim and edges, with surface discoloration and smoothing on the upper surfaces due to weathering and possible vehicle or foot contact. The interior shows grime accumulation and some staining from prolonged outdoor exposure.
attribute_historical_markings: A stylized face or animal motif is carved in relief on the front exterior; no inscriptions or other markings are visible.
